basic_details.job_title: Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biotechnology, M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Biotechnology or M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics from any recognized University.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Burdwan Medical College Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Research Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Biotechnology or M.Sc. in Molecular Biology & Human Genetics from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 30 June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job is located in Purba Burdwan, West Bengal, with the pincode 713104.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and any other required certificates.
